last_success_patterns.summary: Automated in Day 3. auto_improve_readiness_runtime.py now holds the orchestration/render surface at 631 nonempty lines, with queue, learning, release-authority, and constants modules tracked in READINESS_SOURCE_PATHS. Focused readiness tests passed 30 cases, and touched complexity passed for all five split files with zero attention targets.

Automated in Day 3. learning_delta_scoreboard.py is now 696 nonempty lines under the touched budget, helper modules are tracked in SCOREBOARD_SOURCE_PATHS, focused scoreboard tests passed 20 cases, and touched complexity passed for all four split files with zero attention targets.

Automated in Day 4+. make session-synopsis now promotes ops/reports/session-synopsis.json through a candidate path, release phase 2 refreshes it after learning-claim activation, and the current synopsis records promotion_allowed=false, claim_wording_allowed=false, five recent blockers, five forbidden repeat patterns, source-package replay status=pass, and first commands for the next session.

Automated during final closeout by regenerating tests/fixtures/report_schema_samples.json with tools/regenerate_report_schema_samples.py, passing tests/test_report_schema_sample_regeneration.py, and rerunning make release-source-package-check to a pass with ruff, mypy, and test-source-package all clean.

Completed in final closeout: make static ruff-strict-preview mypy-strict-preview passed; make test-public passed 333 tests; make public-check passed with command_fail_count=0; make release-source-package-check passed with ruff, mypy, and test-source-package clean; make check passed 666 tests; artifact freshness is pass/current with 305 records and zero attention/fail records; focused generated-report/session/report-sample contracts passed 42 tests.
